action.reasoning: Observation: The previous script failed because I tried to import `NeRFRenderer` directly from `tsr.models.nerf_renderer`, which is not allowed or doesn't exist in that path. Analysis: I will fix `debug_render.py` to not import `NeRFRenderer` and instead monkey-patch `model.renderer._forward` directly. I will also test different input image processings (RGB vs White Background) and different camera offsets (e.g., azimuth - a0) to find the configuration that yields the highest PSNR against the ground truth RGBA images. Decision: Write and run the updated `debug_render.py`.
